svg.text: openTEPES layered architecture — implemented and planned
Pure-pandas I/O ▸ Pyomo construction ▸ Formulation ▸ Solver ▸ Results — symmetric Elec / Heat / H2 / Hydro · runner orchestrates sweeps

g.text: within …Electricity.py: dc_opf / ac_opf · unit commitment on/off
selectable formulation builders — picked by which functions the driver calls
same idea splits Heat / Hydrogen / Hydro into operation + network later
new sector files: district cooling · CCUS
drop-in: add one file per new energy carrier,
no edits to the existing sectors
each worker reads its own perturbed source,
builds its own model, solves independently
cost: full I/O + build + solve per worker
each worker applies its own overlay dict
cost: build + solve per worker (no re-I/O)
needs: mutable=True · Unix fork · warm start

svg.text: Each box ↔ one module (~150–400 lines). Green = implemented (merged upstream); white = planned (names indicative). Adding a sector = new modules in Layer 4 + Layer 6 + an entry in openTEPES_InputSchema.py. ★ marks sweep-enabling additions.
